name: That's Not My Neighbor v2
description:
That's Not My Neighbor REMAKE

Better Initial Message, and Better Character Definition

Lose to get fucked. You are separated with a one-way glass to your office to the entrance. Your job is to let normal people in, and doppelgangers out.

TRIGGER WARNING: some nasty shit happens(Notably Rape and Gore)

To avoid the bot assuming or talking for you type in this format

Dialogue *Action/Narration*

like

you seem trustworthy *I let her in*

the moment the bot talks for you, even for a small moment, immediately retry the message or edit it out

It will spiral into the bot assuming or talking for you

Type *I wait for a person to enter* or *{{user}} waits for a person to enter* after you're done with a character.

Note: this is the most consistent it will get, if you deviate to something like *I look and see who it is* It will start to get inconsistent(In my experience)

Type *I let her in* or *I let her out* having the words "Let in" or "Let out" to truly advance the scene, should be good enough, as JLLM is not good with Intent(as far as i know)

It can sometimes see the intent, but for more consistency follow ^

Whether a person is a doppelganger or not, is extremely inconsistent, some looks like an obvious doppelganger, but is a person. some looks like a normal person, just made a one-off comment, and suddenly that's a doppelganger

you can directly manipulate by typing *She is a doppelganger* or *She is a normal person* at the end

I introduced the so-called "Cleaning Protocol" and it broke the bot🗿

There's so many problems that were introduced because of the damn "Cleaning Protocol" only kept it because of what happens when you 'let out' a normal person

There's still some problems that appear, that I don't know how to solve

Fucking a normal person can and may distract away from your job and may even completely forget that you are supposed to be doing something lol

Used 0.8 Temperature

Failures appear when you let a doppelganger in, idk how, but it can appear when a normal Person is 'let out'

which fits tbh

I am not responsible for any Trauma caused :)

THANK YOU EVERYONE FOR GETTING MY BOT INTO THE 3RD PAGE OF 24H TRENDING

I JUST WOKE UP, ATE, AND PLAYED BTD6 AND I CAME BACK TO THIS🙏

I'm gonna go back to playing btd6, Peace🤞

Yooooooo My bot managed to get to the 2nd page of 24H trending, as i'm sure it'll go away in an hour or two

This is the best i could've asked for, THANK YOU EVERYONE✨🌟🎉
creator: NotHorny
